summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lead Sniper application - both backend APIs and frontend UI are fully functional. All core features working correctly including lead search, AI-enhanced pitches, WhatsApp integration, and CSV export.
passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (9/9 tests passed)
Lead search with Google Places API integration
AI-enhanced pitch generation using Gemini 3 Flash
WhatsApp link generation with encoded messages
Landing page loads correctly at /leads route
Discovery Parameters form with all required fields
RUN SNIPE button triggers lead search successfully
Results table displays leads with all columns
WhatsApp buttons clickable with proper wa.me links
Export CSV button appears and works
Error handling for invalid locations and missing fields
